hero.title: Explore the sea in a new way
hero.subtitle: Book your boat, find your gear, join tournaments
hero.sub: Book a fishing boat or luxury yacht along Egypt's coastline, source gear from certified vendors, and register for tournaments — all in one trusted place.

step1.body: Our team boards every vessel before approval. We verify the coast guard licence, safety equipment, engine condition, and life jacket count. We approve no boat that doesn't meet our 27-point checklist.

step2.body: Your payment is held in a trusted escrow account. It only goes to the captain 24 hours after the trip ends. If anything goes wrong — cancellation, breakdown, mismatch — you get a full refund, no questions asked.

step3.body: Every booking comes with travel insurance worth up to 100,000 EGP per passenger. Injuries, lost gear, or delayed return — all covered. Because trust alone isn't enough.

home.metaDescription: Book fishing boats and luxury yachts along Egypt's coastline, source gear from certified vendors, and register for tournaments — all in one trusted place.

cta.body: List your boat for free. 0% commission for the first 3 months. Manage bookings, schedules, and payments — from one dashboard.

yachts.title: Available Yachts

detail.defaultDescription: {name} is one of the most booked yachts on Egypt's coast. Designed for luxury sea trips with a professional crew and modern equipment.
detail.review1Excerpt: Exceptional trip — the captain knows every tuna spot.
detail.review1Body: We were a group of five and the crew was professional. The yacht is clean and equipped with the latest gear. We caught a large tuna in the first two hours. Absolutely worth every penny.
detail.review2Excerpt: Best fishing day I've had in Egypt.
detail.review2Body: Captain knew every productive reef in the area. Gear was top-shelf Shimano. Booked via app — confirmation within 20 minutes. Will book again next trip.
detail.guarantee1: Your payment is held in SeaConnect escrow until 24 hours after the trip ends.
detail.guarantee2: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure.
detail.guarantee3: Accepts Fawry · Vodafone Cash · InstaPay · Visa.

yachts.empty: No yachts available at the moment

reviews.successBody: Your review helps other sailors choose the best maritime experiences.

page.heading: Marine Weather Advisory
page.dataSource: Data source: Open-Meteo Marine API · updated hourly

advisory.title: Daily Marine Advisory · التنبيه البحري
advisory.meta: Issued by SeaConnect · Open-Meteo · updated daily
advisory.body: Marine conditions on the Red Sea coast are suitable for sailing in the early hours. Northeasterly winds are expected to pick up in the afternoon. Small vessel captains are advised to stay close to shore and avoid extended trips after 15:00.
advisory.bodyEn: الطقس البحري على ساحل البحر الأحمر مناسب للإبحار خلال الساعات المبكرة من اليوم. يُنصح ربابنة القوارب الصغيرة بالالتزام بالساحل وتجنب الرحلات الطويلة بعد الساعة الثالثة مساءً.

fishing.noData: No fishing data available for this port this month.

fishingGuide.heading: Egypt Fishing Guide
fishingGuide.subtitle: Fish seasons · Fishing methods · Marine guidance

tips.tip1: Best fishing is in the first hours after sunrise and just before sunset.
tips.tip1En: أفضل وقت للصيد في الساعات الأولى بعد الشروق وقبيل الغروب.
tips.tip2: Avoid fishing when wave height exceeds 1.5m for small boats.
tips.tip2En: تجنب الصيد عند ارتفاع موج يتجاوز 1.5 متر للقوارب الصغيرة.
tips.tip3: Night fishing on the Red Sea is excellent during summer months.
tips.tip3En: الصيد الليلي في البحر الأحمر ممتاز خلال أشهر الصيف.
tips.tip4: Coral reefs attract diverse fish — maintain a safe distance.
tips.tip4En: الشعاب المرجانية تجذب أسماكاً متنوعة — ابقَ على مسافة آمنة.
tips.tip5: Ensure you have a fishing permit from the General Authority for Fisheries.
tips.tip5En: احرص على الحصول على تصريح الصيد من هيئة الثروة السمكية.

stepDesc.captainLicense: Certified and endorsed marine driving licence.
stepDesc.insurance: Valid marine insurance covering passengers, vessel, and third-party liability.
stepDesc.inspection: Technical vessel inspection by the SeaConnect team (30 minutes).
stepDesc.bankSetup: Link a bank account to receive booking payouts.
